# Feature Request

## Feature

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

---

## Why would it be useful?

Explain why this feature would improve the project.

---

## Possible solution (optional)

If you already have an idea of how it could be implemented, describe it here.

---

## Additional information

Add any other useful information, examples, screenshots, or references.
